full_text:
Zhu Hao (Wenming) 朱皓 (文明)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Zhu Hao (朱皓), styledWenming (文明), was born in Kuaiji. Established excellent government. Attacked Yuan Shu, later killed by Zhai Rong. Zhu Hao was affiliated with the Han Dynasty and Liu Yao. Zhu Hao lived during the Later Han Dynasty periods of Chinese history.
